Kadir Has University

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

Kadir Has University Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences aims to provide quality education in engineering and science fields, providing students with theoretical knowledge and practical experience. The faculty has a wide academic spectrum with various departments such as Computer Engineering, Electrical-Electronics Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, and Molecular Biology. Additionally, it provides a strong infrastructure to ensure students are industry-ready through research and industry collaborations.
